race.comment: KA YING CHEER (1) has been up for a while, but has been a model of consistency all prep and that fitness edge might be a telling factor in a race where a number of the other major players are only early in the prep. BARBIE'SDREAMWORLD (2) is certainly in that boat and while she will most likely to get to better races than this later in the prep, they are likely to be over a little further. Still, she has a win and a third placing from three first-up runs and was a winner at her only start this trip. JACKS ON ICE (4) hits this race second up after a great return, when only narrowly beaten by KA YING CHEER, and he goes even better second up, so he's a must for quaddies. SEA POEM (8) kicked off last prep here as well and while he failed to fire that day, he progressed through the grades and has trialled like a horse who has improved again between campaigns. WOLF TWENTY ONE (7) steps up in grade, but got within a length of a handy one second-up and looks progressive.
